audit_items.proof_trace: The sole dynamic allocation in nfp_app_nic.c is nfp_port_alloc() at L19; on the error path (nfp_port_init_phy_port failure), nfp_port_free(nn->port) is called immediately before returning (L25). On success paths, ownership is transferred to nn->port, and nfp_net_pf_free_vnic() (nfp_net_main.c:L89) unconditionally calls nfp_port_free(nn->port) during vnic teardown, including the NFP_PORT_INVALID fast-free case (nfp_net_main.c:L208-209). All allocation paths have corresponding free paths.
